title: Buildah push cache doesn't persist across pushes.

comments.body: I think I found the issue. Buildah doesn't read the `/etc/containers/storage.conf` to use `graphroot` as the container storage. Pushing with debug level `debug` it prints `time="2022-08-22T08:44:02Z" level=debug msg="Using blob info cache at /var/lib/containers/cache/blob-info-cache-v1.boltdb"` which is wrong and not persisted across container restarts.

Thanks for the great report, @StarpTech!

Let's move the conversation over to https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/15398 as the fix will happen for both tools simultaneously.
